description_long: This is a rectangular 1-liter juice carton with the brand name 'Faragello' prominently displayed on the front, along with the product name 'Guava Premium Nectar' and vibrant images of sliced guava fruit. The packaging features a blue and white color scheme with water droplets and green leaves, giving it a fresh and appealing look. The front and back panels are nearly identical, both showcasing the guava imagery and branding, while one side panel displays detailed nutritional information in a black and white table. The opposite side panel contains multilingual product information and a barcode. The top of the carton is flat and features a small, square, sealed area, likely where the cap or opening is located. The carton is made of laminated paperboard, typical for juice packaging, and is designed to be lightweight and portable.
description: A rectangular 1-liter Faragello guava juice carton with vivid guava fruit images, blue and white branding, and nutritional information on the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Faragello' brand, 'Goyave Nectar Premium' label, and guava fruit imagery.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutritional facts panel in black and white, with minimal branding visible.
description_view_2: Back view nearly identical to the front, labeled 'Guava Premium Nectar' with guava fruit images and branding.
description_view_3: Side view with multilingual product information and a barcode at the bottom.
